server/tests/test_refine.py :: test_refine_blur_changes_png_output
def test_refine_blur_changes_png_output() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(24, 18)
    compressed = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/png", "png"), max_mb=2)
    refined = refine_compressed_image(
        compressed,
        OutputFormat("image/png", "png"),
        "blur",
        max_mb=2,
    )
    assert refined.startswith(b"\x89PNG")
    original = decode_image(compressed)
    updated = decode_image(refined)
    assert updated.data != original.data

server/tests/test_refine.py :: test_refine_none_returns_same_bytes
def test_refine_none_returns_same_bytes() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(10, 10, 100, 50, 25)
    compressed = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/png", "png"), max_mb=2)
    refined = refine_compressed_image(
        compressed,
        OutputFormat("image/png", "png"),
        "none",
        max_mb=2,
    )
    assert refined == compressed

server/tests/test_refine.py :: test_refine_image_service
def test_refine_image_service() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(20, 16)
    compressed = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=2)
    output, target = refine_image(compressed, "jpg", "sharpen", max_mb=2)
    assert target.extension == "jpg"
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_refine.py :: test_refine_endpoint
def test_refine_endpoint(client: TestClient) -> None:
    compressed = convert_raster(solid_raster(14, 14, 80, 120, 40), OutputFormat("image/png", "png"), max_mb=2)
    response = client.post(
        "/refine",
        data={"format": "png", "post_filter": "blur", "max_mb": "2"},
        files={"image": ("step1.png", compressed, "image/png")},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.content.startswith(b"\x89PNG")
